title: Ace Appears in the Restaurant
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on ace appears in the restaurant, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Ace Appears in the Restaurant. Luffy runs into both Marines and his brother Ace in Nanohana, turning the Alabasta arrival into a chaotic reunion. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: A captain at the Marine HQ,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MMN DMM MOG FMM! (You're that smoke- dude!)

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Wham RMM NUU Don EER!? (What're you doing here!?)

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: MMF NRR GRBB (Thanks for the grub!)

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Mmmm Bffh mini! (Dammit, none of my attacks work on that guy!)

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: MMF DUNNR PDF! (Just gotta run for it!)

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Yes, captain? Do you need a towel? It sure is hot in this country, isn-

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Tashigi! Call up the other marines in this town at once and have them scour this entire city to arrest strawhat and his crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look! It's a fight between devil fruit users!
